div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 热点业务 / 噪声邻居出现

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 邻 group RU 桶耗尽 (非 BURSTABLE→等待回填; BURSTABLE→可超用)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 请求排队 / 降优先级 / Runaway: DRYRUN·COOLDOWN·KILL·SWITCH_GROUP(v8.4)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 无独立内存: 写放大/热点 Region/磁盘队列仍可波及共享 RocksDB 与本 group

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 事后纠偏: 扩容 / 重配 RU / 调 Placement / 拆集群

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 邻租户 Unit IOPS/log disk/memory 达边界

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 内存硬墙: 邻租户 OOM 自报错, 不挤占本租户; 后台任务排队

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: RootService / Unit balance / merge / transfer 介入

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 本租户 P99 基本稳; 必要时调 Unit/Resource Pool/Locality 或迁移租户

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: cgroup 相关异常 (权限缺失/容器无 cgroup)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: enable_cgroup × is_valid() 四象限 → check_cgroup_status() 动态降级

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 隔离退化为 进程内时间片 + 三参数 IO 调度, observer 继续服务 (强度下降, 不中断)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 注: cgroup 自 V4.0 起即可关闭; Cloud 形态的'不依赖 cgroup'不可泛化到 CE 所有场景

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: sys 租户 RootService 选全局版本 → 各租户 major merge

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: merge IO/CPU 压力 → MIN_IOPS(reservation) 保底前台 + enable_global_background_resource_isolation(4.4) 切后台 vCPU

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 仍可能瞬时抖动 → 经增量/渐进/轮转合并 + IO 隔离缓解
